form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Gulfstream Park November 15 over 1207m, 23 len behind Julee's Legacy carrying 52.5kg at $73.10. When resuming last campaign fourth of 8 at Gulfstream Park August 30 2024 over 1106m, 6 len behind Wicked Legacy with 54kg at $11.30. Can go on with the job this prep.

form.formComment: Returns from a 58-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 8 at this track on February 12 over 1308m, 4.5 len behind Ship It with 53.5kg at $4. The race before that ran last of 8 at this track on February 4 over 1207m, 8 len behind Glorious Lady carrying 53.5kg at $4.70. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on March 11 over 1207m, 5 len behind Mt D'oro with 55.5kg at $3.80. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading of 8 at this track on January 25 over 1207m, 12 len behind Timely Reward with 54.5kg at $36.90. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months ran last in a small field at this track on March 28 over 1106m, 18 len behind Athena's Wisdom carrying 54.5kg at $28.10. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at Presque Isle Downs on June 23 over 1207m, 8 len behind Calvary Kat with 55.5kg at $11.60. Unlikely to threaten.
